event_info: short of length angled across; ample width and Jaiswal slashes it to deep backward point; straight to Reddy
swing and miss. Good length ball slanted across; Sooryavanshi looks to loft through the line and is beaten on the outside-edge. The ball kept going away with the angle

that's into the final tier. Sooryavanshi is off the mark in style. Short of length delivery; at the body; not much wrong with the ball; but such is Sooryavanshi's aura; he gets into an excellent position and nails the pull over deep square leg. That ball was close to going out of the ground

back to back sixes. This was not off the middle. But enough to clear the rope. Again short of length; around leg and Sooryavanshi helps it along towards long leg. Plenty of height and the ball lands jusy beyond the rope

hat-trick of sixes. Sooryavanshi seems to be in revenge mode. Good length ball angled across; Sooryavanshi holds a firm base; stays leg-side and lofts it through the line. The ball sails over the long-off fence..

6; 6; 6; 6! Hinge got him for a duck the previous time and today he has smached him for four consecutive sixes in the first over. Another good length ball; Sooryavanshi lofts through the line but once again not off the middle; but such is his power that the ball clears the long-on rope

now Jaiswal joins in. He welcomes Cummins to the IPL with a boundary. Fullish delivery; slanted across the left-hander; Jaiswal leans across and creams the drive through cover. It is a packed off-side field and still he managed to pierce the packed circle
fuller and closer to off; Jaiswal pushes it meekly towards cover

in the air and safe. Back of a length delivery; not quite short to play the pull but Jaiswal goes for it; gets it high on the bat and luckily for him the ball lands short of the incoming mid-on fielder
back of a length around off; Jaiswal gets behind the line and defends it to the off-side
short of length around the hips; Jaiswal whips it in front of square on the leg-side and settles with a single

that's now five sixes in a row. Sooryavanshi is on fire. Cummins goes short and angles it across; the fearless Sooryavanshi takes it on and pulls it in front of square. There's a deep mid-wicket in place but he can only watch it sail over him
short of length around leg; Jaiswal swivels to play the pull and is rushed on the shot; gloves it through short fine and there's no fielder in the deep to stop that

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! Malinga strikes! He's pumped. Much needed breakthrough for Sunrisers Hyderabad. This is a good length delivery
event_info: which Jaiswal tries to loft through the line; gets it high on the bat and miscues it towards mid-on. Klaasen backtracks a few steps and reverse cups it safely. They needed this wicket to arrest some of the momentum Rajasthan Royals had got in the first two overs. Replays show that Jaiswal tried to flat-bat that shot; fetched it from outside off and miscued it completely. Yashasvi Jaiswal c Heinrich Klaasen b Eshan Malinga 10(8) [4s-2]

uhhh! That's nice from Malinga. Good length ball; in the channel around off; Jurel does not move his feet fully forward; looks to defend from the crease and the ball does enough to beat the outside-edge
on a length and close to off; Jurel prods forward and defends it to the off-side
not quite short to play the pull; but Jurel adjusts nicely and places it in front of square. The fielder in the deep gets around and keeps it to a single
slower ball around off; Sooryavanshi makes room and steers it towards backward point

in the air and safe. Back of a length delivery and Sooryavanshi goes for the heave; almost drags it off the inner half and Hinge runs in from deep backward square; the ball lands just in front of him. Could he have dived?
fuller and outside off; Jurel thinks it is there for the drive and throws the kitchen sink behind the shot; the ball curls in a little and beats the inside-edge

edged and four. Full pitcher outside off; Jurel sees the length and throws his bat on the drive; he went hard and hence the outside-edge flies over short third. The fielder is quite fine but Jurel still managed to clear him comfortably
on a length and outside off; Jurel steers to short third and searches for a single. Sooryavanshi sends him back
angling in; Jurel closes the bat face but the ball straightens to take the leading edge; rolls to the left of Cummins
short and outside off; width on offer and Jurel does not miss out; he does not go hard on the cut; allows the ball to come and almost guides it past the backward point fielder

dropped! Aniket has put down Sooryavanshi. How costly is that going to be? Back of a length delivery; angled across and Sooryavanshi heaves it towards deep mid-wicket. Aniket runs to his right; gets there and goes with both hands. The ball pops up and goes to ground. What's worse? While he's picking up the ball his shoe touches the ad cushions; costing two extra runs. He has been removed immediately from that position
short of length slanted across; takes it on and goes for the full-blooded pull shot; the ball keeps bouncing and flies over the top-edge. Salil Arora leaps to glove that
slower ball that is short in length; Sooryavanshi moves away and knocks it into the off-side

in the air and over the infield. Not much width on offer; but Sooryavanshi is not backing out; he looks to flay it over the off-side and miscues it; but fortunately the ball clears cover and lands safely

just over the fielder. Short of length delivery; and Sooryavanshi goes for the pull; he gets more of a top-edge and the ball steadies at deep backward square. But is not able to throw the ball back into play
full toss around off; Sooryavanshi clears his front leg and mistimes the heave to mid-wicket
fullish delivery close to off; Jurel pushes it firmly towards extra cover
that's a gift and Jurel accepts it happily. Full toss around off; he does not try to overhit the drive; presents the full face of the bat and caresses it past the mid-on fielder
sprays the slower ball down leg; Jurel stays inside the line and watches it go past him
short of length around off; Jurel tucks it to square leg and quickly crosses over

fifty for Sooryavanshi. Another 15-ball half century for him. He's had couple of that. Today he has been at his mencacing best. He was dropped in the previous over and he's already making Sunrisers Hyderabad pay. Back of a length delivery; but Sooryavanshi maintains such a solid base on leg-stump that he has the room to open his arms; flat-bats this towards cow corner and clears the rope with ease
slower ball at the batter; Sooryavanshi almost sits down and miscues the hoick to deep square leg

tough to call that a chance. The ball hit Sakib on the forearm and deflected to mid-off. Fullish delivery around off; Jurel drives uppishly but straight back at Sakib. He's in his followthrough and had very less time to react
91.9ks flighted and drifting into leg; Sooryavanshi eases it down to long-on

shot! Overcooks the flighted delivery and Jurel puts it away. Nice stride forward; head on top of the ball and creams it in front of square; he beats a diving cover fielder and gives the sweeper no chance either
googly on off; Jurel hangs back and blocks it down the pitch
short and drifting away; Jurel reaches and chops it square on the off-side
that's massive! Short and outside off; but the width allowed Sooryavanshi to free his hands; flat-bats it straight down the ground and sends it sailing over the sightscreen
once more to the same region but this time the ball bounces short of the rope. Shivang offers width and Sooryavanshi cashes in; slaps it straight back over the bowler and almost sends it the distance
good length ball around off; Jurel gets behind the line and defends it back to Cummins
139.5ks back of a length outside off; Jurel attempts the steer to third man and is beaten on the outside-edge. He was surprised by the pace as the ball skid through after pitching

direct hit might have been interesting. Back of a length and no room on offer; Jurel jabs it towards mid-wicket. Aniket swoops down and under-arms a throw at the non-striker's end. Jurel put in the dive and that might have saved him
low full toss on the pads; Sooryavanshi flicks it backward of square leg
138.4ks back of a length around off; Jurel guides it with an open bat face to third man
good length ball; at the stumps; Sooryavanshi looks to heave it into the leg-side; ekes out an inside-edge onto the back leg and the ball rolls behind the wicket
good length ball around off; Jurel eases it down to long-on and rotates strike
loopy full toss; almost lands around yorker length; Sooryavanshi digs the drive back to Sakib
low full toss outside off; Sooryavanshi drills it straight to mid-off. That's two dots in a row.. Something is got to give
nails the yorker on middle; Sooryavanshi clears his front leg and jams it towards deep mid-wicket

another tough return chance. That's the second time Jurel has hit it straight back at him. Full pitcher close to off; Jurel hammers the drive and Sakib was in his followthrough; he put his hands up to ensure he's not hit on the face; manages to palm it away. That was coming straight for his head and Sakib did well to get his hands up in time

whoa! That's an incredible shot. Sakib didn't miss his yorker by much; maybe an inch or two short; but such is the power of Sooryavanshi; he stays deep in the crease with his front leg cleared; swings through the line and sends it sailing straight down the ground
fuller and outside off; Jurel drives towards extra cover and Abhishek makes a diving stop
slower ball on off; Sooryavanshi is a tad early into his heave and drags it to deep mid-wicket
back of a length around the hips; Jurel tucks it backward of square and settles with a single

smashed! Slower ball outside off; it was overpitched and Sooryavanshi does not a second invitation; he delays his bat swing and drills it wide of long-off. There was a fielder in the deep but he didn't bother
off-pace delivery; Sooryavanshi fetches it from outside off and mistimes it back to Hinge
short of length outside off; Sooryavanshi pats it towards cover and a fumble allows the single to be taken with ease
full toss on the pads; Sooryavanshi flicks it straight to deep mid-wicket
sprays it down leg; Jurel tries to help it along but does not make contact; wide called
good length ball around off; Jurel pats it towards backward point and wants a single; Sooryavanshi is not keen
117ks slower short of length delivery; Jurel hops and slaps it in front of square; wide of sweeper and an easy couple

that's outta here. It is literally out of the ground. 101 meters. Length delivery around off; Jurel shuffles across and gets hold of the whip. The connection couldn't have been any better and sails over the deep square leg stands
short and outside off; Jurel plays the back cut behind square on the off-side. Aniket gets around from third man; dives but is not able to keep the ball in play
112.6ks off-pace delivery; Jurel cuts it to sweeper cover and retains strike
googly that drifts away; Jurel looks to cut and is beaten on the outside-edge
Jurel has stepped on the accelerator. The last few balls he has got the boundaries going.. He brings out the reverse sweep; crouches low and slams it over short third

ball_event: even Sooryavanshi is playing the reverse. He premeditated the shot and Shivang
event_info: even Sooryavanshi is playing the reverse. He premeditated the shot and Shivang
even Sooryavanshi is playing the reverse. He premeditated the shot and Shivang shortened the length; Sooryavanshi stil goes through with the shot and reverse pulls it over backward point
another biggie. This is landed 20-30 rows back. Fullish delivery; right in Sooryavanshi's arc and there are no half measures; full swing of the blade and the ball sails into the deep mid-wicket stand
uhh! 89.2ks slows it up and gets it to turn away; Sooryavanshi looks to loft through the line and is beaten on the outside-edge
streaky! Fullish delivery outside off; Jurel sees the line and goes for the drive; gets a thick outside-edge and the ball races to third man. No chance for the fielder..
full and angling in; Jurel flicks and picks out mid-wicket. That was there and Jurel will feel missed out
sprays it down leg; Jurel tries to help it along and does not connect with the pull; wide called

fifty for Jurel. He gets there with a glorious shot. Nothing much wrong with the delivery. Full pitcher close to off; Jurel presents the full face of the bat and drives it past Reddy. Mid-off is beaten for timing and the entire Rajasthan Royals dugout are on their feet applauding
another wayward delivery down leg; no chance for Jurel to make contact; second wide in the over

ball_event: out Caught by Aniket Verma!! The partnership is broken. Reddy has the last says after going for a couple of fours in this over. This might not be such a bad thing for the Rajasthan Royals
event_info: Jurel had done his job of laying the platform and it is now upto the big-hitters. Reddy hits the pitch hard and extracts some extra bounce; Jurel looks to cross-bat it into the leg-side and is hit on the splice. The ball goes straight up and Aniket comes in from cover to take a simple catch. A fine knock comes to an end. Dhruv Jurel c Aniket Verma b Nitish Reddy 51(35) [4s-8 6s-1]
full pitcher around off; Parag drives and picks out the cover fielder
good length ball on off; Parag eases it to long-on and gets off the mark
136.2ks fullish delivery around off; Parag pats it with soft hands to the off-side and crosses over
slower ball down leg and Sooryavanshi has sent it over the rope. He kneels down; gets under the length and launches it over backward square. He moves into the 90s..
there he goes again. Sakib misses his yorker; dishes out a full delivery; Sooryavanshi clears his front leg and pumps it down the ground. Mid-off was up and he clears him with ease

hundred for Sooryavanshi. Second IPL ton and he's got it off just 36 balls. He removes his helmet; takes his gloves off and keeps everything down. Then does the heart symbol followed by a salute towards the dugout. This has been a magnificent innings. Sakib once again misses the yorker; just by a couple of inches and that is enough for Sooryavanshi to thump it down the ground. He struck that flat and all the way over long-on

ball_event: out Lbw!! Sooryavanshi walks off to a standing ovation. First game for Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur this season and he's given the home crowd pure entertainment. This is the slower ball from Sakib
event_info: Sooryavanshi attempts the fancy reverse lap; a shot he has still not mastered; he's deceived for pace and fails to connect with the shot; struck on the back pad and was right in front of the stumps. The only question was where the ball had pitched and it was just within the stumps as per ball-tracking. Sakib went for a few but has removed his Bihar team mate. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi lbw b Sakib Hussain 103(37) [4s-5 6s-12]
short ball down leg; Ferreira gets inside the line and lets it pass; wide called
Ferreira is off and running. Fullish delivery outside off; Ferreira leans forward and caresses the drive through extra cover. It was all about timing as the ball raced away to the fence
off-pace delivery; Parag waits and punches it square of the wicket
short of length delivery; Ferreira rides the bounce and punches it square on the off-side
135.2ks fuller and outside off; Parag drives in front of square and scampers back for the second
full delivery around off; Parag whips it with a strong bottom hand to long-on
ufff! What fast hands by Ferreira. Short and outside off; he brings his hands down on the ball and slashes it past backward point. No chance of stopping that
135.6ks full pitcher close to off; Ferreira pushes it to extra cover
on a length and around off; Parag punches it straight to cover

dropped! But full marks for the effort. Reddy almost pulled off a blinder. Might have been a contender for catch of the tournament had he caught it. Short of length delivery and Parag nails the pull towards mid-wicket; Reddy moves his left and dives; but the ball was going over him and he stretches his right hand out; the ball does not stick
slower ball around off; Ferreira knocks it to cover

that's a massive hit. Fraction short in length and Ferreira is quick to latch on; he transfers his weight onto the back foot and hammers the pull in front of square; comfortably clear the deep mid-wicket region
130.8ks short of length angled across; Ferreira drops his hands and sways out of the line
that's a good over. Just 7 runs. Another slower short ball; Ferreira tries to swat it into the off-side but is early into the shot

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! That's a corker from Cummins. Not much Parag could have done about that. He's run of low scores stretches to another game. This is a pinpoint yorker
event_info: aimed for the base of off-stump; Parag does not get his bat down in time; the ball sneaks through and crashes into the stumps. Sunrisers Hyderabad are pulling things back. Can they restrict RR to below 230? Riyan Parag b Pat Cummins 7(9)
full delivery around off; Hetmyer drives to long-off
oh no! Full delivery at the stumps; Ferreira drills it gun-barrel straight and the ball clatters into the stumps at the non-striker's end. He was denied a few runs there..
141.1ks full and angled in; Ferreira flicks it wide of deep mid-wicket
low full toss at the stumps; Hetmyer clips it wide of deep mid-wicket and races back for the second

140.5ks speared into the blockhole; Hetmyer jams it to mid-wicket. What a return for Cummins! No cricket since December; first game in the IPL and he finishes with figures of 4-0-27-1 in a high-scoring encounter
thumped! Sakib goes pace off; and Ferreira is waiting for that; he delays his bat swing and connects cleanly with the loft. The fielder at long-on could only watch the ball sail over him
135.3ks yorker aimed for off-stump; Ferreira digs it to the left of Sakib. That's better..
slower balls are not working for Sakib. 114.7ks off-pace delivery; short of length and Ferreira gets hold of the pull; he nails it in front of square and beats the fielder in the deep

Ferreira is taking Sakib apart. Another short of length delivery; that is not troubling Ferreira; he swivels around and hammers the pull over deep square leg. Already 16 from the over and still 2 balls left
137.1ks good length ball angled in; Ferreira toe-ends the heave beside the pitch and Hetmyer crosses over
low full toss outside off; Hetmyer drills it towards extra cover and Cummins makes a fine save
141ks low full toss around leg; Hetmyer digs it back to Malinga

SRH lose the review. Hetmyer steps down and backs away; Malinga follows him and cramps him for room; the flick is missed and the ball brushes the pad on the way to Ishan behind the stumps Definite noise but it was clearly off the pad
another accurate yorker from Malinga; Hetmyer can only dig it out to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! This is turning into such a good over. Just one run so far and now gets the wicket of Ferreira. This was a low full toss
event_info: Ferreira moves away and does not quite get the elevation on the big shot; struck it flat and straight down long-on's throat. Klaasen makes no mistake. A handy little cameo from Ferreira comes to an end. Donovan Ferreira c Heinrich Klaasen b Eshan Malinga 33(16) [4s-3 6s-3]
he's nailing the yorkers for fun; Jadeja clears his front leg and jams it back to Malinga
boundary to end the over. But just 5 runs. For once Malinga misses his yorker; dishes out a full toss and Jadeja takes advantage; swings it to the leg-side and beats long-on to the left
slower bouncer from round the wicket; Hetmyer steps out and decides to leave; called wide for height
nicely done. Hinge goes for the yorker and Hetmyer was ready for it; he stays leg-side and opens the bat face; squeezes it behind square and beats the diving sweeper near the rope
low full toss angled in; Hetmyer clips it wide of long-on and races back for the second

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! Hetmyer will be kicking himself. This was there to be dispatched into the stands and he's picked out the fielder. He knows and puts his hand up in disappointment. Full toss at a nice height
event_info: Hetmyer swings across the line and finds Reddy near deep mid-wicket. He barely had to move to take the catch. But it was the longest side of the ground and hence Hetmyer could not clear it. Shimron Hetmyer c Nitish Reddy b Praful Hinge 11(10) [4s-1]
yorker aimed for the stumps; Archer digs it out into the mid-wicket pocket and sprints back for the second. Was there a chance of a run-out? But Ishan did not glove the ball cleanly
132.5ks yorker around leg; Archer clears his front leg and fails to dig it out; the ball deflects off the pad

excellent catch by Head. But the umpire has sent it upstairs to be checked. Jadeja is confident that it was fair and is walking off. Slower short ball outside off; Jadeja hops and upper cuts it towards deep point. Head runs to his left; bends low and takes it close to the ground. Hang on! Fingers are not under the ball; says the third umpire. So Jadeja will be not out but the duo did not run; it will be a dot to end the innings

oh Jofra would have had a first ball wicket for the fourth time this season had Jurel taken this catch. He is fuming that it has been put down. Lovely away-swinger from short of length; Head got completely squared up and got a thick edge that went to the left of the keeper. Jurel dived to his left and got both hands but spilled the catch
short of length delivery angling and moving away; Head tries to steer it to third man but misses
this is slightly wider than the line outside off stump so it's a wide

Archer is a torture to Travis Head at the moment with the outies. The left-hander is staying leg-side of the ball and trying hard play square on the off-side but misses again. Could have easily been an edge

having extra pace sometimes can work against you. Jofra Archer hasn't bowled a bad ball but Travis head has just used all the pace on this ball and guided this for a six. The problem for the bowler was that the batter didn't try to hit this hard. All he did was just open the bat face and give direction. There was a man at third man but it sailed past him to the left

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! He's tortured him to the core and got him eventually. This will give a great level of satisfaction to the bowler. Head was getting beaten with balls outside off stump so Archer cunningly started this slightly leg side and made it curve away to finish around off stump. The same back of a length zone that Head was so uncomfortable with. He got squared up and poked at it away from the body and this time Jurel accepts the offer. Jofra Archer is roaring in his celebration. He planned this battle and won it hands down. Travis Head c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer 6(5) [6s-1]
event_info: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! He's tortured him to the core and got him eventually. This will give a great level of satisfaction to the bowler. Head was getting beaten with balls outside off stump so Archer cunningly started this slightly leg side and made it curve away to finish around off stump. The same back of a length zone that Head was so uncomfortable with. He got squared up and poked at it away from the body and this time Jurel accepts the offer. Jofra Archer is roaring in his celebration. He planned this battle and won it hands down. Travis Head c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer 6(5) [6s-1]

gee! Jofra Archer has bowled a nasty short ball at 145.4kph first ball and Ishan Kishan was ducking for cover. The ball took the top edge; hit the helmet and flew over the keeper for a six. Archer has a puzzled look on his face. He's beaten the batter for pace and even found the edge; yet it goes for six. Didn't that go off the helmet; he asks the ump
short of length delivery; Abhishek defends to the off-side
FOUR; leg-side ball and Abhishek misses the tickle; ball brushes the thigh pad and escapes to the fence
advances and looks to slap the ball and misses
oh this one is a short ball that's flown down the leg-side and past Dhruv Jurel for four
defended off the back foot; hit the splice of the bat and that means he's getting to zip through
edgeddd and just over slip! Full and swinging away outside off stump; Abhishek goes hard; gets a thick edge and it flies over the cordon. Off the mark in streaky fashion
advances for a big smack but the bowler shortens the length and beats the bat

again not a bad ball at all and he's tapped this off the back foot. Maybe just a wee bit of extra width if you want to be critical. Ishan let the ball come and gave direction to hit in the small gap between backward point and cover-point
short of length delivery just outside off stump; Ishan looks to cut; is rushed for pace and bit of extra bounce as well
top shot! Short of a length delivery angling away outside off stump; Ishan Kishan waits and slaps it off the back foot just in front of square and the ball races away
top ball! Sucked Ishan into poking at it away from body to this short of length delivery. Ball moved away to beat him all ends up
short of length delivery outside off stump; Ishan looks to slash and misses
he went a little fuller and Ishan gets under it and lofts it over the cover. 12 runs off the over and SRH are rolling along nicely
beaten! Short of a length delivery angling away; Abhishek Sharma looks to cut but is beaten for pace

what on earth did you do; Hetty? This was a catch coming straight at him to third man. But the ball came flat and seemed like Hety lost it in the floodlights. He moved away from the line of the ball to avoid getting hit and the ball landed in front of the boundary
the signature step out and loft inside out shot from Abhishek Sharma! Short of a length delivery outside off stump; Abhishek gets under the ball and flat-bats it for a maximum over cover
short of length delivery; Abhishek mistimes the pull to mid-wicket
now he slaps it down the ground past the ump and it races away for four more. Short of a length delivery on the leg stump; Abhishek manages to get it wide of mid-on
short delivery on seeing the batter step out; Abhishek jumped to get bat on ball but he missed. Abhishek was surprised that this wasn't called on the field and got it changed with the review
do not let him access the off-side and get under the ball. Use of the feet again to unsettle the length. It's obviously short and there was enough width for Abhishek to slap it over cover-point
starts with a very full delivery; Ishan drives and picks out mid-off

Tushar Deshpande got a hand on it but he wasn't ready to take the return catch as it came quickly at him. Full delivery; Ishan hits it to the right of the bowler and the left of the ump to get this boundary

1 run; oh Ishan Kishan is hurt by this full ball. He was low to flick this across the line; missed the ball and hit the back leg where there is no protection and he limps the single. Physio comes out to check and he seems good to carry on. Tushar Deshpande was appealing for LBW but ball pitched outside leg

he cannot stop himself from making room and hitting through the off-side. Not a bad ball at all as he followed the batter stepping away. He also cramped him for room but somehow Abhishek managed to dab it between short third and backward point for four

again through the off-side. Tushar Deshpande was going for the yorker but because the batter stepped out he was under pressure and couldn't quite get the length right. Sliced it over cover-point for four more

now Jadeja has put down a sitter. He moved too far to the left and he had to correct that and get his hands to the right to catch the ball. Ended up with no balance and control over the catch. Abhishek sliced this straight to backward point and escaped
down the leg-side first up from Brijesh Sharma

oh careful! These guys hit the ball so hard that if it comes straight at the bowler he will be at high risk of an injury and it's there is no way they will be able to react in time to get out of the way. Thankfully Ishan smacked this between the bowler and the ump
oh poor ball down the leg-side! Brijesh Sharma probably tried to cramp the batter for room but offered a gift and Ishan glanced it between short fine leg and the keeper
and again; this time he couldn't put bat on ball
wonder what is this obsession to bowl leg-side. Ishan picks the slower ball; uses the wrists to drag it behind square and got four more
low full toss outside off stump; Ishan slices it to deep point
slower delivery into the wicket but Abhishek waits; picks it and pulls it through mid-wicket
wide yorker outside off stump; Abhishek Sharma lets it go thinking it will be a wide but it was inside the line
dragged down on the stumps; Ishan Kishan goes on the back foot and pulls it flat and hard to deep mid-wicket; it's in the gap and races away
tossed up and Ishan Kishan comes down the track to drive it hard and straight to long-on
flat and good length down leg; Abhishek Sharma goes on the back foot and nudges it to deep mid-wicket
round-arm and sliding on to leg-stump; Ishan Kishan sinks low to sweep; off the toe-end and rolls away to the left of Riyan Parag
short and wide outside off; Abhishek Sharma goes on the back foot and reaches for it to cut it wide of extra-cover; into the gap and four more
sliding down leg; Abhishek Sharma flicks to the vacant backward square-leg area
way outside off; the slower-ball and full and wide outside off; left alone; wide called
slower-ball off-cutter and on a length outside off; Abhishek Sharma gets forward to loft and it's wide of extra-cover. Races away
tries the yorker length delivery on the pads; it's not quite yorker length; Abhishek Sharma flicks to the vacant mid-wicket area
short and wide outside off; Ishan Kishan reaches for it and cuts in the air; Parag at extra-cover dives forward but it bounces short
full outside off; Ishan Kishan gets forward to drill it hard and straight to mid-on
slower-ball off-cutter and wide outside off; Ishan Kishan doesn't miss out. He reaches for it and cuts; wide of extra-cover. Beats Hetty running across to his left from sweeper cover
low full-toss outside off; Ishan Kishan gets forward and slices it; off the open-face; straight to the fielder at deep backward point
full on off; Ishan Kishan gets forward to drill it hard and straight to long-off
short and off-pace on the stumps; Abhishek Sharma waits and pulls; beats deep mid-wicket running to his left. The back of the hand slower-ball and it sat up short

four more. 50 for Abhishek Sharma. He brings out his celebration. Low full-toss outside off; Abhishek gets forward and opens the face of the bat to drive; it's into the gap. Races away to the deep backward point fence. That went off the bat so quickly
slower-ball on a fuller length on off; Abhishek Sharma gets forward to drive straight to the fielder at extra-cover
another slower-ball; down leg; Abhishek Sharma flicks and misses; called a wide
full outside off; Abhishek Sharma gets forward to drive and it's straight to the fielder at sweeper cover. That again went off the bat quick
low full-toss on off; Ishan Kishan gets forward to drive; wide of backward point and a sliding stop from sweeper cover runs to his right keeps it to a couple
tossed up full on leg-stump; Abhishek Sharma gets forward and makes room outside the leg-stump; drives wide of long-off; they come back for two
again fired outside the leg-stump; following Abhishek Sharma; he backs away and drives straight to the fielder at long-off. This time just one

dragged down and Ishan Kishan is in no mood to let go. He goes on the back foot and pulls to the deep mid-wicket fence. The fielder was square and he had no chance to his left. 50 for Ishan and he raises the bat
when it's tossed up; Ishan Kishan decides to come down the track and it's a clean hit; gets to the pitch of the ball and lofts well; flies over long-on. There's no stopping Ishan at the moment
flat good length on off; Ishan Kishan gets forward and drives to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Jofra Archer!! Taken at long-off. Some respite for RR. It's following Abhishek Sharma outside the leg-stump
event_info: as he comes down the track; no room to loft; still it flies in the air; off the bottom of the bat and Archer takes it just inside the cushions. He did well to adjust his feet and ensure he was not touching it. A stare from Donovan Ferreira follows. RR badly needed that wicket. Abhishek Sharma c Jofra Archer b Donovan Ferreira 57(29) [4s-11 6s-1]
flat good length around leg-stump; Ishan Kishan goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep mid-wicket
first ball and Heinrich Klaasen takes Ravi Bishnoi on. It's tossed up and in the slot; he gets forward and lofts beautifully over extra-cover. One bounce and over
short and wide outside off; Heinrich Klaasen goes on the back foot and cuts; Parag dives to his right at cover and saves runs. Was at least two
flat good length on off; Heinrich Klaasen goes on the back foot and opens the face of the bat to punch it through backward point for one

tossed up full and in the slot; Ishan Kishan is so quick; gets low and out comes the slogsweep; flies over deep mid-wicket and all the way. He's timing them so well. Parag is not happy as he throws his hands up in disappointment. Not sure what he was not happy with

that's a bad ball. Dragged short outside off; Ishan Kishan goes on the back foot and flat-bats it so hard; Ravi Bishnoi did well not to get a hand to it to his left. Was in the air but hit with so much power; no chance for long-on to his right
again Parag with good work at cover. He moves across to his right and dives to save runs. Heinrich Klaasen backs away and drives the length delivery from leg-stump
full and way outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and reaches for it to drive long-off

poor from Bishnoi at backward point. He fumbles and then runs back to save one. But he has given away three. It's short outside off; Ishan Kishan goes on the back foot and cuts hard; should've been stopped. Didn't get the body behind it; and does poorly
flat good length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive on the rise and picks out extra-cover; straight to the fielder; on the edge of the ring
flat good length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen goes on the back foot and cuts wide of backward point; easy two
way outside off; turns away a hint; left alone and wide taken

full outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive and it's to the right of extra-cover; races away to the fence. All timing there. Similar delivery earlier in the over; he found extra-cover; not this time

ball_event: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! Good running and diving forward catch from long-off. Ferreira the man. Was a back of a length delivery outside off
event_info: Ishan Kishan gets forward to flat-bat; but doesn't time it. It looked to be falling short of Ferreira but replays show that he put in the dive when it was not needed. Took it comfortably running forward; then tumbled over. RR still have hope even as Jofra Archer doesn't even celebrate. Ishan Kishan c Donovan Ferreira b Jofra Archer 74(31) [4s-11 6s-3]
short of length and at the body of Nitish Kumar Reddy; who goes on the back foot to defend; is hit on the glove; but rolls down
short of length and outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and taps to backward point

what a snorter that is. Rip-roaring short ball at Nitish Kumar Reddy; who fends at it; off the glove but flies over Dhruv Jurel and Brijesh does well to slide to his left from third man and keep it to one. Kept his feet away from the cushions s
short outside off; pacy again; Heinrich Klaasen tries to upper-cut and misses; flies over the top-edge
short and splice-jarring length at Heinrich Klaasen; he does well to get on top of the bounce; drop his bottom-hand and then play it down. Rolls near his feet
short down leg; Nitish Kumar Reddy hooks and it's a flat six over fine-leg. The fielder was square. Good start to the over for SRH
short of length outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and punches to cover; didn't time it
full and wide outside off; angling away from the right-hander; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward to drive wide of sweeper cover. Ravi the sub runs and slides to his right to keep it to two

slight width and four. It's short of length and pacy; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and slashes hard; flies off the open-face; well wide of backward point; no chance for square third man to his right
full outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward to drive wide of cover; Ravi cuts off the angle and keeps it to one from sweeper cover
full on off; it holds up a tad on Heinrich Klaasen who gets forward to drive; nearly spoons a catch to mid-off. Parag the man and it's on the bounce

dropped by Brijesh at third man. Some in the RR team can't believe it. It's full just outside off; Nitish Reddy gets forward to loft and it flies off the top-edge. Brijesh was already going down and in the end he didn't even get a hand to it. Didn't judge the swirl on the ball. That should've been taken. Since it was an almighty top-edge; the ball swirled away from Brijesh and he didn't account for that
short of length outside off; Heinrich Klaasen goes on the back foot and cuts hard and straight to sweeper cover
short of length on off; Nitish Kumar Reddy goes on the back foot and gently tucks it to deep backward square-leg. That's sensible batting
short on off; Heinrich Klaasen goes on the back foot and pulls it down; to deep backward square-leg

Jofra Archer closes his eyes in disappointment. Now the leading-edge doesn't carry to backward point. It's a short of length delivery on middle; Nitish Kumar Reddy is squared up and he gets lucky. Archer has bowled so well tonight without any luck

end of Jofra Archer. It's full on off; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive it past Archer and to the right of mid-off. Archer stuck out a left hand and it was in the air; but the ball went past the bowler in a flash. It raced off the bat and that was all timing. Archer puts his head down and walks away disappointed. That was such a good shot. High-elbow and all that jazz
low full-toss on the stumps; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive to long-on
full on off; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward to drive to long-off
low full-toss outside off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive and doesn't time it; picks out extra-cover
slower-ball and on a good length on off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive it back to Brijesh Sharma who does well to stop
full on leg-stump; angling into the right-hander; Heinrich Klaasen clears his front leg and drives in front of long-on; they take on Archer and come back for the 2nd
low full-toss on middle; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket

one of the shots of the day. Full on middle; in the slot; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and lofts over extra-cover; all timing and that hit the sweet spot of the bat. He stayed leg-side of the ball and allowed the arms to come through nicely
full and on middle; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive to long-off
full outside off; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward to drive and it's off the thick inner half of the bat; wide of long-on; they take on Ferreira and come back for the 2nd

that's a flat six. Off-pace short delivery outside off; into the pitch; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward and slams the pull; Hetty was more at wide long-on; this flies flat and just clears the deep mid-wicket fence. Raw power from the allrounder
good yorker length delivery on leg-stump; Nitish Kumar Reddy gets forward to dig it out to the vacant short cover area

Tushar Deshpande has been expensive tonight. Low full-toss on leg-stump; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward and flicks; into the gap at mid-wicket and this is right between long-on and deep mid-wicket. Just 16 needed now

the slower-ball leg-cutter and it's short on off; Nitish Kumar Reddy is seeing them so well tonight; gets forward and pulls; flies all the way over deep mid-wicket. Parag with folded hands has a disappointed expression on his face. Abhishek from the dugout likes it as he shows his appreciation to that shot

ball_event: out Lbw!! Superb inswinging yorker and that's beaten Nitish Kumar Reddy for pace. He's hit on the left boot. No bat and that's three reds. He reviews but Kaushik Gandhi's original decision will stand. That was a good delivery. Brijesh Sharma has bowled some really good yorkers this season. A little too late though. Nitish Reddy lbw b Brijesh Sharma 36(18) [4s-2 6s-3]
event_info: out Lbw!! Superb inswinging yorker and that's beaten Nitish Kumar Reddy for pace. He's hit on the left boot. No bat and that's three reds. He reviews but Kaushik Gandhi's original decision will stand. That was a good delivery. Brijesh Sharma has bowled some really good yorkers this season. A little too late though. Nitish Reddy lbw b Brijesh Sharma 36(18) [4s-2 6s-3]
another delivery on the blockhole; Salil Arora gets forward to push it down to long-on
low full-toss on off; Heinrich Klaasen gets forward to drive and doesn't time it; straight to the fielder at extra-cover

it's a fair delivery and Parag's review works. Full and inside the tramline; some part of the ball was inside; Heinrich Klaasen is standing in his original stance; lets it go and Kaushik Gandhi calls it a wide. The review works

ball_event: out Caught by Ravi Bishnoi!! Heinrich Klaasen walks off. It's a low full-toss on middle
event_info: below the waist; he gets forward and swings it; doesn't time it and picks out deep backward square-leg. Bishnoi with the safe hands. Waist is 1.05m and the ball is at 0.87m. Two in the over. But only delaying the inevitable. Heinrich Klaasen c Ravi Bishnoi b Brijesh Sharma 29(24) [4s-3 6s-1]
short of length on middle; Salil Arora goes on the back foot and pushes it wide of backward point. Was bowled from round the wicket
full and down leg; Aniket Verma flicks and misses; called a wide
short outside off; Aniket Verma leans back; opens the face of the bat and glides it down to third man

a six to end the game. Full and angling into the right-hander on middle; Salil Arora gets forward to flick and it's sweetly struck. Flies into the crowd at deep mid-wicket and that's such a commanding win for SRH
